EST. 1981 · SYSTON, LEICESTER

Running better
together.

A friendly, inclusive club for runners of every ability. Structured sessions Tuesdays & Thursdays, track, strength & conditioning, and a calendar packed with races and socials.

40+
years running
2
club nights / wk
18+
all abilities
ARC
& EA affiliated
